Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationTitleFrameMixin); self.titleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_PROFILE_CATEGORY; self.subTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_PROFILE_TEXT; self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_PROFILE_TOGGLE; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PROFILE_TOGGLE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PROFILE_TOGGLE_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
